content: Golden (screenshot) tests are the standard way to test CustomPainter/canvas output in Flutter since widget tests can't easily assert pixel-level drawing. Pattern: pump the widget tree containing the CustomPaint, then expectLater(find.byType(...), matchesGoldenFile('golden/name.png')); generate baseline images with flutter test --update-goldens. For animation-driven painters, pass the AnimationController (a Listenable) as the CustomPainter's  argument so painting re-runs on tick without a full widget rebuild -- tests can pump specific frames/durations (tester.pump(duration)) and capture goldens at key progress values (0%, 50%, 100%). Golden images are platform-render-dependent (font/anti-aliasing differences across OS), so CI must pin a single OS/Skia version or goldens will flake across machines.
